name: rad-writer
description: Writing assistance in Claude Code, transitioning to an engineer-writing focus (technical docs, READMEs, CHANGELOGs, commits, PRs, ADRs, runbooks, technical posts). The `write` / `improve` / `review` orchestrators currently still handle the broader genre set (email, blog, web copy, business reports, research, presentations, prose, social media) — that multi-genre coverage migrates to the Claude.ai skill version at `skills/rad-writer/` as the plugin's pivot completes. Two Python scripts back the audit work: `text-stats.py` (burstiness, em-dash density, hedging, transitions, lexical-tell counts — measured stylometry, not AI-detection) and `check-blocklist.py`. The `ai-audit` skill explicitly disclaims that perfect AI detection is mathematically impossible (per arXiv:2509.11915, Sept 2025). Two agents (voice-analyst, writing-reviewer). 14 reference files including AI patterns organized by durability tier.
